name: ACEI/ARB + diuretic + NSAID renal-risk cluster
risk: Combined hemodynamic effects can sharply reduce glomerular filtration and precipitate acute kidney injury, especially with dehydration, CKD, heart failure, or hypotension.
safety_action: Treat this as one renal-risk cluster. Flag the NSAID for urgent review and reassess the RAAS blocker and diuretic according to volume status, blood pressure, kidney function, and the treating protocol.
urgency_changers: Oliguria, rapidly rising creatinine, severe hyperkalemia, hypotension, pulmonary edema, or uremic features.
pharmacist_traps: Do not evaluate the three medicines as unrelated pairwise interactions.
